# The AI Explainer

The AI Explainer is a plain-English AI literacy site for readers who want practical explanations of AI concepts, tools, training data, privacy, verification, and responsible use.

## Main Pages

- Home: https://theaiexplainer.com/
- Articles: https://theaiexplainer.com/articles.html
- Resources and checklists: https://theaiexplainer.com/resources.html
- Editorial policy: https://theaiexplainer.com/editorial-policy.html
- About: https://theaiexplainer.com/about.html
- Privacy policy: https://theaiexplainer.com/privacy.html

## Practical Workflow Guides

- How to Use AI for Meeting Notes Without Losing Decisions: https://theaiexplainer.com/articles/ai-for-meeting-notes.html
- How AI Can Help With Project Management Without Taking Over: https://theaiexplainer.com/articles/ai-for-project-management.html
- How AI Can Support Customer Service Without Sounding Robotic: https://theaiexplainer.com/articles/ai-for-customer-support.html
- How to Write Better AI Prompts: A Practical Guide: https://theaiexplainer.com/articles/how-to-write-better-ai-prompts.html
- A Simple AI Risk Assessment for Everyday Users: https://theaiexplainer.com/articles/ai-risk-assessment-for-everyday-users.html
- How to Check AI Citations and Sources: https://theaiexplainer.com/articles/ai-citation-and-source-checking.html
- How Job Seekers Can Use AI Without Losing Their Own Voice: https://theaiexplainer.com/articles/ai-for-job-seekers.html
- How to Use AI for Language Learning Without Memorizing Bad Mistakes: https://theaiexplainer.com/articles/ai-for-language-learning.html
- How Parents Can Explain AI to Kids in Plain English: https://theaiexplainer.com/articles/ai-for-parents.html
- How to Write a Simple AI Policy for a Small Team: https://theaiexplainer.com/articles/small-team-ai-policy.html
- What to Check Before You Automate a Task With AI: https://theaiexplainer.com/articles/ai-automation-checklist-before-you-automate.html
- How Nonprofits Can Use AI Carefully and Practically: https://theaiexplainer.com/articles/ai-for-nonprofits.html
- How to Use AI With Spreadsheets Without Trusting Bad Data: https://theaiexplainer.com/articles/ai-for-spreadsheets.html
- How Content Creators Can Use AI Without Becoming Generic: https://theaiexplainer.com/articles/ai-for-content-creators.html

- How to Compare AI Assistants Without Getting Lost: https://theaiexplainer.com/articles/how-to-compare-ai-assistants.html

- AI output checklist: https://theaiexplainer.com/ai-output-checklist.html
- Prompt library: https://theaiexplainer.com/prompt-library.html

- AI glossary: https://theaiexplainer.com/ai-glossary.html

## Editorial Notes

Articles are written for everyday readers, use original wording, include practical examples, and link to sources for further verification.
